title: All Stone To Tools
description:
Are you ever in a cave, and your tools break, but you only have a crafting table, some sticks, and a bit of andesite? Well now you can turn that andesite into a stone pickaxe.

Feel free to use in a modpack
body:
Are you ever in a cave, and your tools break, but you only have a crafting table, some sticks, and a bit of andesite? Well now you can turn that andesite into a stone pickaxe.

Lets you use other stone types to craft things that use cobblestone. This includes things like tools and workstations

Feel free to use in a modpack, just please give credit.
